name: From Stochastic to Stable: Rank Stability and Structural Sufficiency in AI Visibility Measurement

description: arXiv:2607.10341v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: AI visibility measurement is comparative: practitioners want to know which domains generative search engines cite most often and whether observed differences are large enough to support decisions. Yet the industry lacks a principled way to determine whether enough data has been collected. Collection budgets vary widely across studies and platfor...
author: Ronald Sielinski
